script: TENANT=50186224-2255-444a-b321-60a84114115c; for B in emily-claude neil-claude stephanie-claude; do echo "========== $B =========="; APP=$(grep -oE '[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}' /home/azureuser/${B}-responder.py 2>/dev/null | head -1); echo "  APP=$APP"; echo "  ----- vault secret -----"; SECRET=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name ${B}-bot-client-secret --query value -o tsv 2>/dev/null); echo "  raw-length=${#SECRET}"; CLEAN=$(printf '%s' "$SECRET" | tail -n 1); echo "  clean-length=${#CLEAN}"; if [ "${#SECRET}" != "${#CLEAN}" ]; then echo "  >>> SECRET HAS WARNING PREFIX — needs cleanup"; fi; echo "  ----- SP exists? -----"; az ad sp show --id $APP >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '  SP exists' || echo '  >>> SP MISSING'; echo "  ----- BF token test (using clean candidate) -----"; RESP=$(curl -s -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/$TENANT/oauth2/v2.0/token" --data-urlencode "client_id=$APP" --data-urlencode "client_secret=$CLEAN" --data-urlencode 'grant_type=client_credentials' --data-urlencode 'scope=https://api.botframework.com/.default'); HAS=$(echo "$RESP" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("yes" if d.get("access_token") else "no")' 2>&1); echo "  has_token=$HAS"; if [ "$HAS" != "yes" ]; then ERR=$(echo "$RESP" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print((d.get("error_description") or d.get("error") or "?")[:150])'); echo "  err: $ERR"; fi; echo "  ----- inbound activity? -----"; A=/home/azureuser/.${B}-bot/activities.jsonl; if [ -f $A ]; then echo "  activity entries: $(wc -l < $A)"; else echo "  no activities.jsonl yet (Microsoft hasn't delivered any messages)"; fi; echo; done
